User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the Cocofy application, encapsulating general profile information and their assigned role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: The role of the user within the application (manager or worker).

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

fcmTokens.description: List of FCM registration tokens for push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents an in-app notification sent to a specific user.

WorkerProfile.title: WorkerProfile
WorkerProfile.description: Stores specific attributes and preferences for users with the 'worker' role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the associated User entity. (Relationship: User 1:1 WorkerProfile)

skills.description: A list of skills possessed by the worker, relevant to job assignments.

availability.description: General availability status of the worker (e.g., 'full-time', 'part-time', 'on-demand').

rating.description: Average rating of the worker based on past job performance.

preferredLocation.description: The worker's preferred geographical area for job assignments.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the worker profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the worker profile was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Contains details about the customer requesting a coconut harvesting job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity.

name.description: The full name of the customer or organization.

contactPerson.description: The name of the primary contact person for the customer.

email.description: The contact email address of the customer.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the customer.

address.description: The physical address of the customer or job location.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Represents a single coconut harvesting job request, detailing its requirements, schedule, and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job entity.

managerId.description: Reference to the User who created and is managing this job (manager role). (Relationship: User 1:N Job)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer for whom this job is being performed. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Job)

title.description: A brief title describing the job.

description.description: A detailed description of the job requirements and scope.

location.description: The specific location where the job is to be carried out.

scheduledDateTime.description: The date and time when the job is scheduled to begin.

requiredWorkersCount.description: The number of workers required for this job.

status.description: The current overall status of the job (e.g., 'pending', 'scheduled', 'in-progress', 'completed', 'cancelled').

managerConfirmationStatus.description: The status of the manager's confirmation for the job (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', 'unconfirmed').

reminderSentAt.description: Timestamp when the pre-job confirmation reminder was sent to the manager.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was last updated.

JobAssignment.title: JobAssignment
JobAssignment.description: Represents an individual worker's assignment to a specific job, including their response and progress.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobAssignment entity.

jobId.description: Reference to the Job this assignment is for. (Relationship: Job 1:N JobAssignment)

workerId.description: Reference to the User assigned to this job (worker role). (Relationship: WorkerProfile 1:N JobAssignment)

assignmentStatus.description: The current status of this specific worker's assignment (e.g., 'assigned', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'completed', 'cancelled_by_worker', 'reassigned').

assignedDateTime.description: Timestamp when the worker was assigned to the job.

responseDateTime.description: Timestamp when the worker responded (accepted/rejected) to the assignment.

completedDateTime.description: Timestamp when the worker marked their assignment as completed.

managerNotes.description: Specific notes from the manager regarding this assignment.

workerNotes.description: Specific notes from the worker regarding this assignment (e.g., reason for rejection).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job assignment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the job assignment record was last updated.

firestore.reasoning: Standardizing paths for simplified access and notification support.
